product_overview: CodTech Internship Portal is a modern internship tracking platform for students, with a blue-themed authentication experience and a protected dashboard for viewing assigned projects. It supports registration with internship domain selection and a personalized progress-focused workspace.
core_goals: Create an account with an internship domain selection
Sign in with email and password to access the portal
View a personalized dashboard with assigned course and project information
Track project progress across active internship work
Review earned XP and badges as progress is made

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows students to register with an internship domain and sign in with email and password to access the portal.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Select an internship domain -> Submit the registration form -> See the account created experience
Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the authenticated experience
Navigate to / -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Select an internship domain -> Submit the registration form -> See the blue-themed authentication interface render consistently

features.name: Internship Dashboard
features.description: Shows authenticated interns their personalized dashboard with project cards, assigned course details, and progress-related information.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See personalized greeting -> View assigned course information -> View project cards -> Review available internship projects
Navigate to /dashboard -> View project cards -> Select an active project -> Track progress for the selected project -> Continue monitoring completion status
Navigate to /dashboard -> View project cards -> Review XP and badge progress indicators -> Observe earned progress updates

routes.description: Landing page and Login form with critical branding fallbacks
Dedicated login page with blue UI stabilization
User registration page with domain selection
Protected user dashboard with null-safe data fetching and cache-busting

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and Registration with domain-matching logic and visual stability
user_interactions: Click Sign In or Create Account
Observe immediate rendering of blue theme

features.name: Internship Dashboard
features.description: Viewing assigned projects and tracking progress with error resilience
user_interactions: Observe no client-side exceptions during data load
